# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build

workflow:
  rules:
    - when: always

default:
  tags: []
  interruptible: true
  retry:
    max: 1
    when:
      - runner_system_failure
      - stuck_or_timeout_failure
      - api_failure
      - unknown_failure

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY: recursive
  BUILD_SCRIPT: ""
  BUILD_SCRIPT_FILE: ""
  BUILD_SCRIPT_ARGS: ""
  BUILD_SCRIPT_SHELL: "bash"
  BUILD_WORKDIR: "$CI_PROJECT_DIR"
  BUILD_ENV_FILE: ""
  BUILD_PRE_SCRIPT: ""
  BUILD_POST_SCRIPT: ""
  BUILD_ALLOW_FAILURE: "false"

build:
  stage: build
  allow_failure:
    rules:
      - if: '$BUILD_ALLOW_FAILURE == "true"'
        when: always
      - when: never
  rules:
    - when: on_success
  before_script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - cd "${BUILD_WORKDIR}"
    - |
      if [ -n "${BUILD_ENV_FILE}" ] && [ -f "${BUILD_ENV_FILE}" ]; then
        set -a
        . "${BUILD_ENV_FILE}"
        set +a
      fi
    - |
      if [ -n "${BUILD_PRE_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        "${BUILD_SCRIPT_SHELL}" -lc "${BUILD_PRE_SCRIPT}"
      fi
  script:
    - |
      if [ -n "${BUILD_SCRIPT_FILE}" ]; then
        if [ ! -f "${BUILD_SCRIPT_FILE}" ]; then
          echo "BUILD_SCRIPT_FILE not found: ${BUILD_SCRIPT_FILE}" >&2
          exit 1
        fi
        chmod +x "${BUILD_SCRIPT_FILE}" || true
        "${BUILD_SCRIPT_SHELL}" -lc "./${BUILD_SCRIPT_FILE} ${BUILD_SCRIPT_ARGS}"
      elif [ -n "${BUILD_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        "${BUILD_SCRIPT_SHELL}" -lc "${BUILD_SCRIPT} ${BUILD_SCRIPT_ARGS}"
      elif [ -x "./ci/build.sh" ]; then
        "${BUILD_SCRIPT_SHELL}" -lc "./ci/build.sh ${BUILD_SCRIPT_ARGS}"
      elif [ -x "./build.sh" ]; then
        "${BUILD_SCRIPT_SHELL}" -lc "./build.sh ${BUILD_SCRIPT_ARGS}"
      else
        echo "No build script configured." >&2
        echo "Set BUILD_SCRIPT or BUILD_SCRIPT_FILE, or add an executable ./ci/build.sh or ./build.sh" >&2
        exit 1
      fi
  after_script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - cd "${BUILD_WORKDIR}"
    - |
      if [ -n "${BUILD_POST_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        "${BUILD_SCRIPT_SHELL}" -lc "${BUILD_POST_SCRIPT}"
      fi
  artifacts:
    when: always
    expire_in: 7 days
    paths:
      - dist/
      - build/
      - out/
      - target/
      - artifacts/
    reports:
      dotenv: build.env
